antipattern.symptom: Route handler uses res.status(500).json({err: e.message}) in catch.
antipattern.fix: Route handlers always `next(err)`; central error middleware maps err → status + body.

antipattern.symptom: Process exits on SIGTERM immediately; k8s drains show 502s.

antipattern.root-cause: Author left helmet off or applied it after routes.
antipattern.fix: app.use(helmet()) at the top; verify with curl -I.
